name: gpt-audio
description: Text-to-speech and speech-to-text using OpenAI's audio APIs.

voice.description: TTS voice to use (e.g. alloy, ash, ballad, coral, echo, fable, nova, onyx, sage, shimmer).

stt_model.description: Model for speech-to-text (e.g. gpt-4o-transcribe, gpt-4o-mini-transcribe, whisper-1).
